title: Automation Templates: save entire automation
excerpt: When saving an automation as a template we need it to save the entire automation just as it is created, including all fields and selections.

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: When saving an automation as a template we need it to save the entire automation just as it is created, including all fields and selections.

posts.author: cherylfjc (Cheryl)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes it would be great to apply the automation saved on one board to other boards set up the same way.
